name: Codex Bridge
description: Import forgekit skills into the OpenAI Codex agent surface. Maps skill markdown to the AGENTS.md conventions Codex uses, wires context injection, and documents which skill types work with Codex's tool-call model.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Codex Bridge
pt-BR.description: Importe skills do forgekit na superfície do agente OpenAI Codex. Mapeia o markdown de skills para as convenções AGENTS.md usadas pelo Codex, conecta a injeção de contexto e documenta quais tipos de skill funcionam com o modelo de chamada de ferramenta do Codex.
